title: Hosting community technology
description: Discord age verification got you down? Don't like giving Google all your data? Is Facebook spying harshing your vibe? A better future is possible! Come learn and share your ideas on how we can host cozier alternatives to big tech monopolies for your community/friend group! Technical background not required :)

title: Autistic furs meetup!
description: Calling all autistic furs! Want to show-and-tell your deep interest? Want to swap stories with other autistic furs? Want to learn from others in the community? Then come out to this NeurodiFURsity meet-and-greet!

title: Queers on Transit
description: Come say hi and talk about your experiences as LGTBQIA+ or ally with public transportation. Whether you're an employee, frequent rider, or just appreciate vehicles on tracks or rubber wheels. We will have a social and Q&A session to share experiences about the things that help us get around!

title: CLOWNSHOP
description: WELCOME TO CLOWNSHOP!!! We’re in deer trouble and might have invited too many of y’all as potential marketing interns, so we set up a totally rigorous interview process! Separated into teams, y'all will be asked to create pictures based on your prompts, where you will then be asked to sell our shareholders on your design! Using magazines, markers, or any traditional means necessary

title: Hooved Furs Meet
description: Are you a creature with hooves? Wanting to meet and socialize with other hooved creatures? If you're a deer, sheep, cow, or anything else hooved, then this meet is for you!

title: How to Lewd in Tabletop RPGs
description: What happens when your characters want to get lewd in your tabletop game? How do you inject sexy scenes without squicking everyone out? How do you be respectful of all the players and their comfort levels while still managing steamy encounters? This panel talks about how to handle the spicy side of tabletop gaming as a GM and player. (AC)

title: Trades Furs Meetup
description: Whether you're a sparky, pipe turner, wrench turner, or any of the other awesome trades, come say hi and meet fellow trades furs!

title: Paint Those Claws
description: Love painting your nails, or would you like to give it a try? Join this chill meetup where we will paint our nails together! If you don't have any polish, some will be available. There will also be a simple tutorial on colour selection and how to paint a cute pawprint on your thumb!

title: Boat Life
description:
This is the panel where I attempt to convince you that living on and working on/near the water is your next best life adventure! As well as prove to you that you've already got what it takes! 
Learn about living on and working on boats. What its like to work in the boat yard, and how you can navigate doing both!

title: Fursuiting 101
description: Just became a handler and want to know how to keep your fursuiter happy? Just got a new suit and want to learn how to properly care for yourself and your new purchase? Join Lindel as she goes over some basic tips on how to keep you suiting happily.

title: Littles Panel
description: Join half pint and northern wolf as we give you a safe space to just be you. Whether you're a little, a caregiver or just curious. Join us in welcoming  this panel to tails of summers first year (AC)

title: Karaoke
description: Come and sing your heart out in style in this late night karaoke panel! All types of songs are allowed as long as the karaoke version exists on youtube!

title: Hair of the Dog viewing party
description: A Never before seen viewing of the pilot episode of a furry sitcom “Hair of the Dog”, a series about furries taking over and saving a family owned bar that isn't doing so well.

title: Sewing and Costumery 101
description: You picked up a needle and thread for the first time, and went straight to techniques and materials that scare many garment and costume makers: Knits! Faux fur! Making your own patterns! Let's chat about how you can use your newfound skills to expand into a really amazing and empowering hobby

title: Sonic Furs Meetup
description: If you love Sonic the Hedgehog, this meet-and-greet is for you. Whether you’re new to Sonic or have loved the franchise for 35 years, come hang out with other Sonic fans at this gathering hosted by the Sonic Furs.

title: Remnants of Old Vancouver
description: Do you know what the McDonald McBarge was? Or what the ruins in Barnet Marine Park used to be? We'll aim to fascinate you with fun facts/lore about landmarks, buildings and bygone transit/infrastructure that you can no longer see in Vancouver today. Share your history knowledge or come discover small bits of Vancouver history!

title: Dinosaurs and the world they Lived in
description: Do you like dinosaurs and other Mesozoic animals? Well you may learn a few more things about the wonderful reptiles that lived in our ancient past and what the world looked like to them. may include some swear words 'cause dino's are Hella rad.

title: Commissions 101 for Artists & Buyers
description: Commissions are an artists' bread and butter and one of the most common types of things that people buy in the fandom. Regardless of if you are offering commissions or looking to buy art, there are things you should know . Come and learn about the art of Commissions from a long time professional artist, for both standard and spicy work.

title: TransFemme 101
description: Had questions after coming out? Not sure what face wash is right? Questions about how to dress or what a "flat" shoe is? We will answer this and more at TransFemme 101.

title: TransFemme 201 - After Dark
description: Do you have questions about sex and sexuality after transition? Perhaps a partner who has recently transitioned? Bring all your AD questions to a panel geared towards answering the sensual questions of transfemme transition! (AC)

title: Kink Curiosity
description: Ever wondered if certain species were into particular kinks? As it turns out, there are trends! Join Jaydar for a discussion about which species are most likely to be into which kinks, and find out if your own proclivities line up with other members of your group! (AC)

title: Love Without Fear
description: Ever been curious about boundaries, self love & love to others either plutonic or romantically or ever been scared of saying "No"? Well at this panel we shall teach you! Learn to love without fear as you learn to express, feel, respect and understand more about yourself and others around you in a safe space!

title: Musician's Meetup
description: Do you like making music? Do you wanna meet other like minded furries who do too? Come stop by the musicians meet & greet! It’ll be a fun time for everyone!

title: Bird Panel
description: Chirp! calling all bird sonas or fans of birds. Come flock over to our bird panel. We will feature ice breaker games, trivial , prizes, socializing and more

title: Pets & Play
description: Join the fun, whether you have gear or not, everyone is welcome! Come to hang out, play or bark/meow/neigh. Owners and Handlers are free to watch, or join in. Don't forget to bring your favorite toy(s)! (AC)

title: Zumba 101
description: Always wanted to build up stamina to be as cool as all the dancers at Floor Wars? Then please come on down to learn beginner friendly dance moves.

title: RC Car Racing
description: Drive actual RC Cars on a custom track with jumps, bumps, and turns!  See who's the best!  Want to bring your own?  We'll be using 1/24th scale Losi Micro-B and Micro-T style vehicles - get info here!  https://link.avali.me/rc

title: 'Hear me out'-a fun justifying game
description: Have a questionable smash? Wonder if people are as kinky as you? Come and justify your ‘questionable’ choices and see who agrees with you. (AC)

title: Murrsuiters meet and greet
description: social meet and greet for all that may be interested into meeting other people that maybe interested into murrsuiting, have questions about murrsuits, talk about what draws theme into murrsuiting or just curious about the scene (AC)

title: Rubber Social
description: Hey Rubber creatures! Come hang out for an hour of fun socializing, sweating, and shining! Come meet new friends and share your interest in the rubber/latex world. Come dressed in your shiniest gear. (AC)

title: tying the knot. a furry wedding
description: Tying The Knot. A theatrical furry wedding ceremony where Maxxi and Kayda are getting married in fursuit. Come join us for this crazy wedding adventure, where things might not always goes to plan...

title: Nerf War
description: The eternal battle of foam flinging fun continues! Bring your own blaster, or borrow one of our loaners and ammo for a game or an entire nerf war!  Eye protection recommended. All ages!

title: Intro to Chinese lion Dance
description: Ever wondered what lion dance actually means beyond the loud drums and colourful costumes? Come learn about the history and cultural traditions behind the traditional Chinese lion dance in this casual, beginner-friendly panel. There will be live demonstrations, movement breakdowns, and a chance to try operating the lion yourself as both the head and tail. Whether you are interested in performance, culture, costume movement, or just want to wear a giant lion head for a few minutes, this panel welcomes everyone!

title: Opening Ceremonies
description: Join us as we kick off the start of our first year of Tails of Summer!

title: Sundae Social (ticketed)
description: Come meet and hang out with fellow furs and make new friends over ice cream delights! $25 ticket purchase required, in the registration kiosk or at the door.

title: Aro/Ace Meet 'n' Greet
description: Want to meet other folks on the aromantic and asexual spectrums? Come enjoy some relaxing activities and meet new folks in a low stakes, casual setting.

title: Social VR Meetup
description: VRChat, Resonite, ChilloutVR, or any other social VR platform, this is the meetup for you!  Interested in trying VR or joining one of the most furry-friendly environments you can be in?  Come and say hi!

title: Fursuiting gymnastics
description:
Hello furries ever wanted to improve your fursuit photos, or find a way to learn a cool trick to show off in fursuit
Come to fursuiting gymnastics 101. You will be given a notebook
With 4 levels in it you can earn stamps on as you learn things. Bring your cameras and ill take photos of you trying out the tricks

title: Learn to play Daggerheart
description: ADVENTURES WANTED! Come sit down and learn to play Daggerheart, a rules-light DnD-like  adventure you help create! $10 buy in covers 2 dice sets, character cards, reference and character sheets

title: Everybody's Karaoke!
description: Sing your heart out... Together! Come sing your favorite duets, sea shanties, and call-and-response songs, (along with the legally mandated dose of Sweet Caroline)

title: Is Your Fursona A Hybrid?
description: Is your fursona a Hybrid? A mix of animals in one body? Would you like to meet other Hybrids? Then come on over and hang out! Learn more about Hybrids and help others learn in exchange.

title: Paw Pains
description: Do you suffer from pain in your wrists, elbows, shoulders, or neck? Do you need to use a wrist brace or compression gloves to get any work done? Jaydar is a muscle and joint specialist who is at the forefront of new and exciting research that is already affecting treatment techniques. Join us for a panel discussing muscle and joint issues, why they occur, and what you can do about it!

title: Collaring 101
description: Are you looking to be collared? Have no idea what that means or could mean? Not sure how to collar? Come and learn more in a safe space! (AC)

title: Wings of Fire Fan Meetup
description: If you are a fan of wings of fire, or are just getting dragged along by your friends, come enjoy discussions about wings of fire, games, such as trivia, and just have fun  hanging out with fellow fans of the book series.

title: Weird and Kinky types of Vore
description: Ever felt like normal vore wasn't kinky enough? Ever wanted your pred to dominate you so much that you become part of them? Soul vore might be for you! Become part of your pred with Sentient Fat, or trap your prey in Hammerspace. The ultimate dom/sub experience might just be one bite away (AC)

title: fatfur meet
description: Are you a plus-sized furry who wants to mingle with others just like you? Or perhaps you're a fan of big furs, and just want to be surrounded by them and folks with a similar mindset! All who enjoy fatfurs/ARE fatfurs are welcome at this meet & greet.

title: Just Dance
description: Hello fellow furries. Enjoy jamming to some good tunes with friends? Come get your groove on at our just dance panel. We will feature games from within the past few years Come get some exercise and have a good time with friends

title: Music Bingo
description: Are you a bingo fiend? Can you name that tune? Want a chance at some prizes of dubious quality? Come on down to music bingo! Listen to short clips of songs and mark the ones you hear on your provided bingo card. Make a line, shout it out, and you might just go home with something to show for it - besides bragging rights, of course!

title: Nevvermore's Crow Market
description: Do you have trinkets like Ducks, Kandi, Keychains or other knicknacks you have fallen out of love with? Do you want to trade or give them to other people? This is the panel for you! Bring your own items to swap with other people.

title: Fursuit Games
description: Participate in or watch fursuiters attempt to compete in fun games for the entertainment of everyone, including them!  Full costume head covering and handpaws are required to participate, but all are welcome to watch or volunteer to help!

title: Life Drawing
description: Life drawing! Come drop in any time to draw other con-goers [or come volunteer to be drawn] in various poses. Suited and non-suited models, short and long poses. Bring your art supplies of choice and get some practice in! Sketchpads and pencils available to use. Absolute beginners welcome!

title: Munch Brunch (ticketed)
description: A "Munch" (Meeting over Lunch), but for brunch. The Munch Brunch is an introductory social for people interested in kink, BDSM, alternative relationship lifestyles or fetishes. Its a non-sexual first touch for people to meet other people with similar interests in a casual social atmosphere to connect and discuss interests over a delicious meal. Ticket purchase required. $45 in the registration kiosk or at the door as supplies last.

title: Charity Auction
description: Come and check out our amazing items and get ready to make a difference as we raise money for our charity. Check out our amazing items!

title: Hiss and Scritch
description: A chance for attendees to provide feedback to con leadership about what you liked, what you didn't like and what you would like to see in the future

title: Closing Ceremonies
description: Come close out the convention with us and learn about Tails of Summer 2027!

title: Floor Wars
description:
Do you love to dance? Come strut your stuff at Tails of Summer's very own floor wars!
It will feature a cipher-style 1v1 setup with no scoring, no brackets, and anyone can join!

title: Yuri connoisseur meetup
description: Whether you're a longtime yuri enthusiast or just beginning your journey this panel is for you! Join fellow fans for a celebration of yuri across manga, anime, webcomics, visual novels, and more (AC)

title: My Little Pony fan meetup
description: Come chat about your favorite characters, generations, episodes, comics, fan works, and collections. Come make new friends, share your pony passion and show off merchandise or art

title: Pup 101
description: Have you ever wanted to drop to all fours, bark at a stranger, and chase a squeaky toy across the floor? No? Just us? Well, buckle up, because we're about to unleash something incredible. Join the Vancouver Pup and Handler community (YVR-PAH) for a deep dive into the wild, weird, and wonderful world of pup/pet play. Whether you're a curious fur who's always wondered what's going on at those moshes, or someone who's been secretly googling "puppy hoods" at 2am, this panel is for you. We'll cover everything: what pup play actually is (and isn't), the history, the headspace, the gear, the etiquette, safety and consent, and how to get involved. No experience required. Good boys, good girls, and good enbies of all kinds welcome. (AC)

title: Pup Mosh
description:
Whether you're ready to zoom around like you've had three espressos or just want to curl up in a puppy pile and vibe, we've got you covered. YVR-PAH is hosting an open pup mosh: a safe, consensual space where pups can play hard, cuddle harder, or just exist in their most authentic feral (or lazy) selves.Handlers, come wrangle (or snuggle) your pets. Spectators, come witness the cuteness. Curious attendees, participation is always welcome but never required.
Gear encouraged. Tail wags mandatory. Naps entirely acceptable. (AC)

title: Qmunity in the Community
description: Come learn about Qmunity, Tails of Summer's charity! From peer groups to counselling to legal services, QMUNITY offers a variety of programs and services for 2SLGBTQIA+ folk and allies of all ages. Learn about Qmunity's spaces and services and how to access them.

title: Furry Feud
description: We're playing the Feud! Two teams selected from the audience complete to find the most popular answers to our themed, custom questions.  Help us by answering our survey at link.avali.me/furryfeud
